policyname: Recipients can block dates for confirmed proposals
using_expr: null
with_check_expr:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (schedule_events se
     JOIN issued_quotes q ON ((q.id = se.quote_id)))
  WHERE ((se.contractor_id = contractor_availability_overrides.contractor_id) AND ((se.start_time)::date = contractor_availability_overrides.date) AND (se.event_type = 'quote_proposal'::text) AND (se.is_confirmed = true) AND (q.recipient_id IN ( SELECT profiles.id
           FROM profiles
          WHERE (profiles.user_id = auth.uid()))))))
